import axios from"axios";// import { authActions } from "../store/auth-slice";
import{API_URL}from"../constants/baseUrl";function useReq(){var sendRequest=function sendRequest(route,type,body,cb){var user=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("user"));console.log("user",user.access_token);var api=axios.create({baseURL:"".concat(API_URL),headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",Accept:"application/json",Authorization:"Bearer "+(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.access_token)}});api({method:type,url:"".concat(route),data:body}).then(function(response){cb(null,response);}).catch(function(error){cb(error,null);});};return{sendRequest:sendRequest};}export default useReq;
